description: 1:1 and small-group private conversations between users with read receipts and notification preferences

actors.name: Message Sender
actors.description: User initiating or participating in a direct conversation

actors.name: Messaging System
actors.description: Handles room creation, subscription management, and delivery

transitions.description: User hides the conversation from sidebar
New message received reopens the conversation in sidebar

general: A direct conversation is created on first message if one does not already exist between the participants
Only the participants of a direct conversation may read or send messages within it
The number of participants in a direct conversation must not exceed the system-configured maximum
Sending a message to a closed conversation automatically reopens it in the sender's and recipient's sidebars
Each participant has an independent unread count and notification preference for the same conversation
Muting a user suppresses notifications but does not remove access to the conversation
Blocking a user prevents them from sending new direct messages
Direct conversations persist even when a participant is deactivated; historical messages remain readable
End-to-end encryption may be enabled per conversation; all messages are encrypted before transmission when active
Read receipts record the timestamp of a participant's last read position

given: authenticated user requests a direct conversation with one or more valid users
participant count does not exceed the system maximum

given.description: No existing direct conversation between this exact set of participants

conversation_created.result: A new private conversation room is created and all participants are subscribed

given: authenticated user requests a direct conversation with one or more valid users

given.description: An existing direct conversation already exists for these participants

conversation_reused.result: The existing conversation is surfaced and reopened in the user's sidebar

given: sender is authenticated and a participant in the conversation
conversation is not blocked by either participant
message content or attachment is present
message_sent.result: Message is delivered to all participants and unread counts are updated

given: recipient opens the conversation or scrolls to a message
message_read.result: Unread count is cleared and read receipt is updated for the participant

given: one or more specified participant usernames do not resolve to active users
participant_not_found.result: User is informed that one or more recipients could not be found

given: requested participant count exceeds the system-configured maximum for direct conversations
participant_limit_exceeded.result: User is informed of the participant limit and asked to reduce the number of recipients

given: requesting user is not a participant in the target conversation
access_denied.result: Access to the conversation is denied without revealing its existence

errors.message: One or more recipients could not be found. Please check the usernames and try again.
You cannot add more than the allowed number of users to a direct message.
You do not have access to this conversation.

events.name: direct_messaging.conversation_created
events.description: Fires when a new direct conversation room is first created

events.name: direct_messaging.conversation_opened
events.description: Fires when an existing conversation is reopened in a participant's sidebar

events.name: direct_messaging.message_sent
events.description: Fires when a message is successfully delivered to a direct conversation

events.name: direct_messaging.messages_read
events.description: Fires when a participant reads messages, clearing their unread count

related.reason: Shares the underlying message delivery and notification infrastructure
Allows participants to edit or delete sent direct messages
Allows emoji reactions on direct messages
Allows threaded replies within direct conversations

goals.description: Ensure private 1:1 and small-group conversations are created, delivered, and tracked reliably with correct access control

success_metrics.measurement: Messages successfully delivered / total messages sent
Access attempts by non-participants that succeeded

human_checkpoints: before blocking a user or suppressing their messages system-wide
before purging conversation history for a participant

invariants: only participants of a conversation may read or write to it
blocking a user suppresses notifications without exposing conversation existence
unread counts are maintained independently per participant

acceptance_tests.given: no existing direct conversation between two users
acceptance_tests.expect: new conversation room created and both participants subscribed

acceptance_tests.given: a third user attempts to read a conversation they are not part of
acceptance_tests.expect: DM_ACCESS_DENIED returned without revealing conversation details

capabilities.description: Create or reuse a direct conversation room for a given set of participants
Maintain independent unread counts and notification preferences per participant

tradeoffs.reason: conversation existence must not be revealed to non-participants even on access denial
